description: Banking-grade hot files. Each entry MUST also be in stryker.config.mjs `mutate:` list. The hot-files gate script enforces killRatioMin per file.

hotFiles.rationale: Input guardrail — blocks insults, off-topic, prompt injection. Banking-grade contract.
Cursor encode/decode — IDOR risk if a mutant flips the boundary check.
sanitizePromptInput — Unicode normalisation + zero-width strip + truncation. SSRF/injection adjacent.
Audit log chain integrity. Mutation here = silent compliance break.
Circuit breaker for LLM provider failures. Mutation = stuck-open or stuck-closed.
Refresh-token rotation persistence. Mutation = token-reuse vulnerability.
Auth session orchestration including rotation policy + MFA gating. Co-pinned with refresh-token repo.
